text: As I pass through the stark, modern corridor and into the exhibition space, I feel myself crossing a threshold—not just physically, but intellectually. The "R+D" theme pulses with the spirit of inquiry. Inside, surrounded by symbols of innovation and thoughtful curation, I become aware of a quiet anticipation. My presence here is both observer and participant, invited to ponder how human invention and meaning flourish—even within the structured, sterile confines of institutional walls. I sense an undercurrent of possibility and the hopefulness that knowledge and growth bring.
